headline: Jim Cramer on Salesforce: “It’s Tough Because the Market Hates Software”
summary: Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer shared his thoughts on as he discussed Big Tech’s AI spending. When a caller asked about the stock during the episode, Cramer said: Okay, CRM’s very tough. It’s one of my smallest positions. It’s tough because the market hates software, whether it be Palantir, whether […]

headline: How The Workday (WDAY) Story Is Shifting As AI Ambitions Meet Slower Growth Concerns
summary: Workday’s modelled fair value holds steady at US$179.22, with no shift in the central price target despite updated assumptions in the valuation model. This stability comes as Street research turns more cautious overall, with several firms cutting targets or moving to Neutral or Hold, while others highlight potential upside from AI related execution and long term investments. As you read on, you will see how these mixed signals fit together and how to keep track of the evolving story around...
